case_title: NAOMI VANDERKINDRED VS. ARRAN PERA ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VANDERKINDRED, NAOMI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PERA, ARRAN PERA, MELISSA $300.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $420.00, THE CASE AGAINST ROBERT MULHALL DBA MOLD MUNCHER IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLEASE SEE ATTACHED MC-025. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

DEFENDANT MELISSA PERA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROBERT MULHALL DBA MOLD MUNCHERS IS PRESENT. THE COURT FINDS THE CASE AGAINST ROBERT MULHALL IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
